name: drive-assistant-mobile
description: Drive Assistant Mobile — assistant courses Leclerc Drive on-device (React Native CLI, TypeScript). Solution autonome, isolée du projet mcp-leclerc-drive.

scripts.bundle:ios: npm run prepare:env && react-native bundle --platform ios --dev --entry-file index.js --bundle-output /tmp/dam-ios.bundle
scripts.bundle:android: npm run prepare:env && react-native bundle --platform android --dev --entry-file index.js --bundle-output /tmp/dam-android.bundle
scripts.build:bundle: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run bundle:ios && npm run bundle:android
scripts.typecheck: npm run prepare:env && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.test.json
